idea-plugin.name: GoTo Declaration
idea-plugin.description:
Enhances the Go To Declaration navigation in JetBrains IDEs by extending the default behavior to support additional languages and frameworks, including Kotlin and Handlebars/Mustache templates.

Features:

  • Click any variable in a Handlebars (.hbs) template to navigate to the corresponding Kotlin property declaration
  • Supports Handlebars/Mustache template references (when the Handlebars plugin is installed)
  • Compatible with both K1 and K2 Kotlin compiler modes

Simply press Ctrl+B (or Cmd+B on macOS) on a symbol to jump directly to its declaration.
